CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Under Terms
Of Stipulated Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-12-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement.

Plaintiff's "motion to enter judgment under terms of stipulated settlement" is granted; no timely opposition filed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
